---
title: "Chlorophyll Data integration and explotraion"
format: html
Authors: Emily Richardson, TBD
---
# This workbook contains code to integrate pre-cleaned chlorophyll data. See 01-prefixed notebooks for cleaning steps.

## Load Packages
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(plotly)
```

## Read in data and keep only dates that fall within the range of continous monitoring data
```{r}
#Continuous monitoring
cm_data <- read.csv("data//01_processed//01_chl_cm_daytime_avg.csv")
cm_data <- cm_data %>% select(-X)
maxdate <- as.Date(max(cm_data$date))
mindate <- as.Date(min(cm_data$date))

#ScienceBase
sb_data <- read.csv("data//01_processed//01_chl_sciencebase.csv")
sb_data <- sb_data %>% 
    mutate(date = as.Date(datetime)) %>%
    filter(between(date, mindate, maxdate))

#EMP
## TBD
#EDI
## TBD

rm(mindate, maxdate)
```

## Combine the data
```{r}
cm_data <- cm_data %>% 
    select(-station, -group) %>%
    rename(sample_type = instrument,
    chl_ugl = avg_fchl) %>%
    mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>% 
    mutate(chl_ugl = round(chl_ugl, 2)) %>% 
    distinct()

sb_data <- sb_data %>%
    select(-datetime) %>%
    distinct()

chl_data <- rbind(cm_data, sb_data)
rm(cm_data, sb_data)

chl_data <- chl_data %>% filter(!is.na(latitude)) %>% filter(!is.na(longitude)) %>% filter(!is.na(chl_ugl))

summary(chl_data)
```


```{r}
#Visulaize the data
fig <- plot_geo(chl_data, lat = ~latitude, lon = ~longitude, color = ~chl_ugl)
fig <- fig %>% add_markers(
    text = ~paste(chl_data$sample_type, "Sample Type"), hoverinfo = "text"
  )
  
```
